MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Janet A. Kramer (petitioner) to appear on June 06, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear. The Petition for letters of administration is also continued to June 06, 2023. If no appearance on that date and the non-appearance is not excused, the petition will be ordered off calendar.

Judge; Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.
